questionHtml: Determine the distance fallen, in m, by the centre of mass of the sphere including an estimate of the absolute uncertainty in your answer.
markschemeHtml:
distance fallen = 654 – 12 = 642 «mm»

absolute uncertainty = 2 + 0.1 «mm» ≈ 2 × 10–3 «m» or = 2.1 × 10–3 «m» or 2.0 × 10–3 «m»

 

Accept answers in mm or m

[2 marks]

meta.title: Determine the distance fallen, in m, by the centre of mass of the sphere including an estimate of the absolute uncertainty in your answer.
